name: opsx
description: Orchestrated OpenSpec apply — the main agent groups pending tasks by scope and dispatches a worker per group (parallel then serial by dependency), only managing OpenSpec state and reviews; it never writes implementation code itself. Ships /opsx:apply-subagent (Claude subagent worker) with its SOT skill. Requires the agency-agents catalog at ~/.agency-agents (install per the README); a role it cannot resolve there halts the run rather than standing in a fabricated expert.
